name: Pliance
description: Pliance is a Swedish compliance platform offering APIs for customer due diligence, sanctions and PEP screening, transaction monitoring and ongoing monitoring designed for developers and compliance teams.

seo.title: Pliance — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Pliance: Pliance is a Swedish compliance platform offering APIs for customer due diligence, sanctions and PEP screening, transaction monitoring and ongoing moni

when_to_use: Customer due diligence API for Swedish fintech onboarding
PEP and sanctions screening with Nordic registry integration
Transaction monitoring for EU AML directive compliance
Ongoing monitoring with real-time watchlist change alerts
Developer-first AML API with detailed documentation and SDKs

pros: Sanctions, PEP, CDD and monitoring combined
Transparent Swedish entity for GDPR comfort
Strong fit for Nordic and EU fintechs
cons: Smaller data provider than tier-1 incumbents
Adverse media depth limited by data partners
Case management lighter than enterprise suites
review.verdict: Clean, developer-friendly AML stack for EU fintechs; a good Nordic alternative to WorldCheck bloat.
review.best_for: Nordic and EU fintechs wanting modern AML APIs with GDPR-aligned hosting and clear docs
review.not_for: US-heavy teams or enterprises needing tier-1 data providers and full case-management workflows

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
